chosen_approach: Direct text replacement across 6 affected files. Replace seed with mission spec in intake SKILL.md and specifying.md, remove onboard references and legacy migration tables from setup SKILL.md and SKILLS.md (en+ko), fix conventions.md reference in SKILLS.md (en+ko), rename Seed Check and Onboard Check headers in specifying.md.
non_goals: Removing general English word onboarding when not referring to the old skill
verification_strategy: grep for deprecated terms (seed, onboard as skill name, conventions.md) across plugin/ and docs/ — zero hits expected (excluding CHANGELOG.md)

architecture_decisions.decision: Remove entire Phase A-1.6 section from setup SKILL.md
architecture_decisions.rationale: Legacy agent migration no longer needed — v1.0 released
constraints: Users with very old .geas/ directories lose automatic migration

architecture_decisions.decision: Remove entire Absorption Reference table from SKILLS.md (en+ko)
architecture_decisions.rationale: Migration purpose served. CHANGELOG preserves history.
constraints: Users referencing old skill names lose the lookup table

architecture_decisions.decision: Update specifying.md headers: Seed Check→Spec Check, Onboard Check→Rules Check
architecture_decisions.rationale: Internal reference docs using deprecated terminology

risks.description: Removing absorption table loses migration reference
Old agent memory files silently persist

preserve_list: All CLI commands and schema references

design_review.summary: Approved with additions. specifying.md added to scope, all architecture decisions confirmed sound.
